These are the\ncards ``loadTopics()`` would hand to ``createTopicCard()`` after an SSE\n``result_created`` event triggers a reload.\n\"\"\"\nimport pytest\n\nfrom tests.e2e.canvas_render import node_available, render_card, render_cards\n\npytestmark = pytest.mark.skipif(\n    not node_available(), reason=\"node not on PATH — cannot drive canvas DOM runner\"\n)\n\n\n# --- card-shape factory -------------------------------------------------------\n\n\ndef _staleness_level(seconds: int) -> str:\n    \"\"\"Mirror canvas.js getStalenessLevel() thresholds for the test fixtures.\"\"\"\n    if seconds < 600:\n        return \"fresh\"\n    if seconds < 3600:\n        return \"stale\"\n    return \"very-stale\"\n\n\ndef _card(\n    label: str = \"Pods\",\n    *,\n    seconds: int = 5,\n    summary: str | None = \"3 pods running\",\n    urgency: str = \"normal\",\n    data: dict | None = None,\n    topic_type: str = \"project\",\n    topic_id: str = \"t-1\",\n    result_count: int = 1,\n    latest_result: dict | None = ...,  # sentinel: build from summary/urgency\n) -> dict:\n    \"\"\"Build a card dict in the exact TopicCard.to_dict() shape the canvas gets.\"\"\"\n    if latest_result is ... and summary is not None:\n        latest_result = {\"summary\": summary, \"urgency\": urgency, \"data\": data}\n    elif latest_result is ...:\n        latest_result = None\n    return {\n        \"topic\": {\n            \"id\": topic_id,\n            \"label\": label,\n            \"type\": topic_type,\n            \"project_slugs\": [],\n            \"scope\": \"session\",\n            \"session_id\": \"s-1\",\n            \"created_at\": 0,\n            \"last_active\": 0,\n            \"archived_at\": None,\n            \"result_count\": result_count,\n        },\n        \"staleness\": {\"seconds\": seconds, \"level\": _staleness_level(seconds)},\n        \"latest_result\": latest_result,\n    }\n\n\n# --- render contract ----------------------------------------------------------\n\n\nclass TestCardRendering:\n    def test_card_with_result_renders_label_and_summary(self):\n        out = render_card(_card(label=\"Pods\", summary=\"3 running\"))\n        html = out[\"outerHTML\"]\n        assert \"topic-card\" in html  # the root class loadTopics() appends\n        assert \"fresh\" in out[\"className\"].split()  # fresh staleness class\n        assert \"Pods\" in html  # label rendered\n        assert \"3 running\" in html  # result summary rendered\n        assert out[\"dataset\"][\"topicId\"] == \"t-1\"  # data-topic-id dataset\n\n    def test_card_without_result_still_renders(self):\n        \"\"\"A topic with no latest_result still renders its header + staleness.\"\"\"\n        out = render_card(_card(label=\"Empty\", summary=None))\n        html = out[\"outerHTML\"]\n        assert \"Empty\" in html\n        assert \"result-content\" not in html  # no result block\n        assert \"staleness-indicator\" in html  # staleness footer still present\n\n    def test_label_is_html_escaped(self):\n        \"\"\"Labels are escaped via escapeHtml() — no raw markup injection.\"\"\"\n        out = render_card(_card(label=\"<script>alert(1)</script>\", summary=\"ok\"))\n        html = out[\"outerHTML\"]\n        assert \"<script>alert(1)</script>\" not in html  # not rendered raw\n        assert \"&lt;script&gt;\" in html  # escaped\n        assert \"alert(1)\" in html  # visible text preserved\n\n    def test_summary_is_html_escaped(self):\n        out = render_card(_card(summary=\"<b>bold</b>\"))\n        assert \"&lt;b&gt;\" in out[\"outerHTML\"]\n\n    def test_topic_type_badge_reflects_type(self):\n        out = render_card(_card(topic_type=\"research\"))\n        assert 'class=\"topic-type research\"' in out[\"outerHTML\"]\n\n\nclass TestStaleness:\n    \"\"\"getStalenessLevel() drives both the card class and the STALE badge.\"\"\"\n\n    def test_fresh_has_no_stale_badge(self):\n        out = render_card(_card(seconds=60))\n        assert \"fresh\" in out[\"className\"].split()\n        assert \"STALE\" not in out[\"outerHTML\"]\n\n    def test_stale_shows_badge(self):\n        out = render_card(_card(seconds=900))  # 15 min -> stale\n        assert \"stale\" in out[\"className\"].split()\n        assert \"STALE\" in out[\"outerHTML\"]\n\n    def test_very_stale_shows_badge(self):\n        out = render_card(_card(seconds=7200))  # 2 h -> very-stale\n        assert \"very-stale\" in out[\"className\"].split()\n        assert \"STALE\" in out[\"outerHTML\"]\n\n\nclass TestUrgency:\n    def test_urgency_badge_class_and_text(self):\n        out = render_card(_card(summary=\"fire\", urgency=\"critical\"))\n        html = out[\"outerHTML\"]\n        assert \"urgency-badge critical\" in html  #        result_data = json.loads(results[0][\"data\"])\n        assert result_data[\"bead_id\"] == bead_ref\n\n        # Simulate API dismissal (this is what dismissCard() calls)\n        deletion_result = await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n        assert deletion_result[\"result_deleted\"] == 1\n\n        # Verify result is removed from store\n        results_after = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n        assert len(results_after) == 0\n\n        # Verify topic cards no longer include the stuck result\n        topics = await        ]\n        assert len(stuck_results) == 0\n\n    async def test_failed_card_dismissal_complete_flow(self, store, broadcaster):\n        \"\"\"Test full failed card dismissal flow from creation from results.\"\"\"\n        # Create session and stuck card scenario\n        session_id = await store.create_session()\n\n        utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n utterance_id=utterance_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            project_slug=\"adc\",\n            intent_type=\"task-profile\",\n            bead_ref=bead_ref,\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n        )\n\n        # Create stuck result\n        result_id = await store.create_result(\n            intent_id=intent_id,\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            summary=\"Task stuck — needs your input\",\n            data={\n                \"bead_id\": bead_ref,\n                \"stuck_reason\": \"Test dismissal\",\n be queried and removed\n        result = results[0]\n        assert result[\"id\"] == result_id\n        assert result[\"intent_id\"] == intent_id\n\n    async def TestCardDismissalEndToEnd:\n    \"\"\"Test complete end-to-end dismissal flow: click → API call → DOM removal → persistence.\"\"\"\n\n    async def test_stuck_card_dismissal_complete_flow(self, store, broadcaster):\n        \"\"\"Test full stuck card dismissal flow from creation to removal.\"\"\"\n        # Create session and stuck card scenario\n        session_id = await store.create_session()\n        surface_id = await store.register_surface(session_id, \"canvas\")\n\n        utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n            session_id=session_id,\n            raw_text=\"End-to-end stuck dismissal test\",\n        )\n\n        topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n            label=\"E2E Stuck Dismissal\",\n            session_id=session_id,\n            topic_type=\"project\",\n        )\n\n        bead_ref = \"e2e-stuck-dismiss\"\n        intent_id = await store.create_intent(\n            utterance_id=utterance_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            project_slug=\"adc\",\n            intent_type=\"task-profile\",\n            bead_ref=bead_ref,\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n        )\n\n        # Create stuck result\n        result_id = await store.create_result(\n            intent_id=intent_id,\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            summary=\"Task stuck — needs your input\",\n            data={\n                \"bead_id\": bead_ref,\n                \"stuck_reason\": \"E2E test\",\n                \"refusal_count\": 1,\n                \"message\": \"Stuck for end-to-end testing\",\n            },\n            urgency=\"high\",\n        )\n\n        # Verify result exists in store\n        results = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n        assert len(results) == 1\n        assert results[0][\"id\"] == result_id\n        # data is stored as JSON string, need to parse\n        import json\n        result_data = json.loads(results[0][\"data\"])\n        assert result_data[\"bead_id\"] == bead_ref\n\n        # Simulate API dismissal (this is what dismissCard() calls)\n        deletion_result = await store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n        assert deletion_result[\"result_deleted\"] == 1\n\n        # Verify result is removed from store\n        results_after = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n        assert len(results_after) == 0\n\n        # Verify topic cards no longer include the stuck result\n        topics = await store.get_active_topics(session_id)\n        stuck_results = [\n            t\n            for t in topics\n            if t.get(\"latest_result\", {}).get(\"data\", {}).get(\"bead_id\") == bead_ref\n        ]\n        assert len(stuck_results) == 0\n\n    async def test_failed_card_dismissal_complete_flow(self, store, broadcaster):\n        \"\"\"Test full failed card dismissal flow from creation dismissed cards don't reappear on topic reload.\"\"\"\n        session_id = await store.create_session()\n\n        utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n            session_id=session_id,\n            raw_text=\"Persistence test\",\n        )\n\n        topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n            label=\"Persistence Test\",\n            session_id=session_id,\n            topic_type=\"project\",\n        )\n\n        bead_ref = \"persist-dismiss-test\"\n        intent_id = await store.create_intent(\n            utterance_id=utterance_id,\n            session_id=session_id,\n            project_slug=\"adc\",\n            intent_type=\"task-profile\",\n            bead_ref=bead_ref,\n            topic_id=topic_id,\n        )\n\n        # Create stuck\",\n            data={\"bead_id\": bead_ref, \"stuck_reason\": \"Persistence test\"},\n            urgency=\"high\",\n        )\n\n        # Verify result exists (simulating initial topic store.delete_result(result_id, session_id)\n\n        # Simulate topic reload (results query again)\n        results_after = await store.get_results_for_intent(intent_id)\n        assert len(results_after) == 0\n\n    async def test_multiple_cards_selective_dismissal(self, store):\n        \"\"\"Test that dismissing one card doesn't affect other cards.\"\"\"\n        session_id = Dismissal state is handled correctly\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom html.parser import HTMLParser\n\nimport pytest\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, patch\n\nfrom src.session.store import SessionStore\nfrom src.sse.broadcaster import SSEBroadcaster\n\n\n# --- DOM parser for button structure verification ----------------------------------\n\n\nclass _Node:\n    \"\"\"One element node in the parsed tree.\"\"\"\n\n    __slots__ = (\"tag\", \"attrs\", \"classes\", \"children\", \"text_parts\")\n\n    def __init__(self, tag: str, attrs: list[tuple[str, str | None]]) -> None:\n        self.tag = tag\n        self.attrs = {k: (v if v is not None else \"\") for k, v in attrs}\n        cls = self.attrs.get(\"class\", \"\")\n        self.classes = set(cls.split()) if cls else set()\n        self.children: list[_Node] = []\n        self.text_parts: list[str] = []\n\n    def _walk(self):\n        for child in self.children:\n            yield child\n            yield from child._walk()\n\n    def find_all(self, *, tag: str | None = None, class_: str | None = None,\n                 attrs: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> list[\"_Node\"]:\n        \"\"\"All descendants matching tag / class / exact attribute values.\"\"\"\n        out: list[_Node] = []\n        for node in self._walk():\n            if tag is not None and node.tag != tag:\n                continue\n            if class_ is not None and class_ not in node.classes:\n                continue\n            if attrs and any(node.attrs.get(k) != v for k, v in attrs.items()):\n                continue\n            out.append(node)\n        return out\n\n    def find(self, **kw) -> \"_Node | None\":\n        matches = self.find_all(**kw)\n        return matches[0] if matches else None\n\n    def has_class(self, class_: str) -> bool:\n        return class_ in self.classes\n\n    @property\n    def text(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Own text plus all descendant text, whitespace-collapsed.\"\"\"\n        parts = list(self.text_parts)\n        for node in self._walk():\n            parts.extend(node.text_parts)\n        return \" \".join(p for p in parts if p).strip()\n\n\n_VOID = {\"area\", \"base\", \"br\", \"col\", \"embed\", \"hr\", \"img\", \"input\",\n         \"link\", \"meta\", \"param\", \"source\", \"track\", \"wbr\"}\n\n\nclass _TreeBuilder(HTMLParser):\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        super().__init__(convert_charrefs=True)\n        self.root = _Node(\"__root__\", [])\n        self._stack: list[_Node] = [self.root]\n\n    def handle_starttag(self, tag, attrs):\n        node = _Node(tag, attrs)\n        self._stack[-1].children.append(node)\n        if tag not in _VOID:\n            self._stack.append(node)\n\n    def handle_startendtag(self, tag, attrs):\n        self._stack[-1].children.append(_Node(tag, attrs))\n\n    def handle_endtag(self, tag):\n        for i in range(len(self._stack) - 1, 0, -1):\n            if self._stack[i].tag == tag:\n                del self._stack[i:]\n                break\n\n    def handle_data(self, data):\n        s = data.strip()\n        if s:\n            self._stack[-1].text_parts.append(s)\n\n\ndef parse_card_html(card_out: dict) -> _Node:\n    \"\"\"Parse one render_builtin_card output dict into a query tree.\"\"\"\n    root = _TreeBuilder()\n    root.feed(card_out[\"outerHTML\"])\n    root.close()\n    # The card root is the first real element under the synthetic root.\n    assert root.root.children, \"rendered card had no root element\"\n    return root.root.children[0]\n\n\n# --- Card data fixtures       surface_id = await store.register_surface(session_id, \"canvas\")\n\n        utterance_id = await store.create_utterance(\n            session_id=session_id,\n            raw_text=\"End-to-end
